name: PFDrawer
description: Side room for contextual detail and secondary workflows.
responsibility: Provide contextual detail or secondary workflows while preserving workspace context.

requirements: Drawer purpose must be announced clearly.
Keyboard focus must move into the drawer when it opens.
Dismissal controls must remain reachable and understandable.

composition_rules: Drawers should not replace primary pages for complex workflows.
Context summary should help the user stay anchored to the underlying workspace.
anti_patterns: using drawers as hidden full page replacements
putting unrelated tasks in one drawer
obscuring the relationship between drawer content and the parent workspace
